---
title: "`r params$report_title`"
author: "`r params$report_author`"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    theme: flatly
    toc: false
    code_folding: hide
params:
  # Engine flag: TRUE only when this template is stitched into the
  # combined report (set by the parent). Leave false for normal renders.
  combined_mode: false
  # Master Data Path (one row per labeled point)
  data_path: !r here::here("1_data", "master_district_scatter.csv")

  # Variables
  x_var: "spending_index"    # numeric x-axis
  y_var: "outcome_score"     # numeric y-axis
  label_var: "district"      # point labels

  # Where to split each axis: "median" (default), "mean", or a fixed number
  x_split: "median"
  y_split: "median"

  # Quadrant captions (tr=top-right, tl=top-left, br=bottom-right, bl=bottom-left).
  # Leave "" to omit a caption.
  quadrant_label_tr: "High spend · High outcome"
  quadrant_label_tl: "Efficient: low spend, high outcome"
  quadrant_label_br: "Underperforming: high spend, low outcome"
  quadrant_label_bl: "Low spend · Low outcome"

  # Policy-Facing Labels
  metric_name: "Spending vs Outcomes"

  # --- Report Text (all editable; leave "" to use the smart default) ---
  report_title: "Where Does the Money Work? Quadrant Scatter"
  report_author: "Ibraheem Saqib Ellahi"
  chart_title: ""
  chart_subtitle: ""
  x_label: ""
  y_label: ""
  source_note: "Generated via CERP Analytics Template"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = !isTRUE(params$combined_mode),
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  dev.args = list(bg = "#FAF9F6"),
  fig.path = paste0(here::here("4_output", "figures"), "/"),
  fig.width = 9,
  fig.height = 6.5,
  fig.retina = 3
)
```

```{r cerp-style, echo=FALSE, results='asis', eval=!isTRUE(params$combined_mode)}
cat("<style>", readr::read_file(here::here("2_R", "cerp_style.css")), "</style>")
```

```{r load-and-prep}
library(tidyverse)
if (!requireNamespace("ggrepel", quietly = TRUE)) {
  stop("The 'ggrepel' package is required for this template. ",
       "Run renv::restore() from the project root, then re-render.", call. = FALSE)
}
library(ggrepel)

source(here::here("2_R", "2.5_helpers.R"), local = TRUE)

# Load data (headers/values whitespace-scrubbed) and validate YAML params.
# All quadrant logic + plotting live in viz_scatter_quadrant().
raw_data <- cerp_load(params$data_path)
cerp_validate(raw_data, params[grepl("_var$", names(params))])
```


```{r plot-scatter}
source(here::here("2_R", "2.0_setup_theme.R"), local = TRUE)
source(here::here("2_R", "2.6_viz_functions.R"), local = TRUE)

viz_scatter_quadrant(
  data              = raw_data,
  x_var             = params$x_var,
  y_var             = params$y_var,
  label_var         = params$label_var,
  x_split           = params$x_split,
  y_split           = params$y_split,
  quadrant_label_tr = params$quadrant_label_tr,
  quadrant_label_tl = params$quadrant_label_tl,
  quadrant_label_br = params$quadrant_label_br,
  quadrant_label_bl = params$quadrant_label_bl,
  metric_name       = params$metric_name,
  chart_title       = params$chart_title,
  chart_subtitle    = params$chart_subtitle,
  x_label           = params$x_label,
  y_label           = params$y_label,
  source_note       = params$source_note
)
```
